student_input: Hello, I got 950 marks in Matric, 880 in FSc and my ECAT score is 230 out of 400. Can I get admission in UET Lahore?

state.student_input: Hello, I got 950 marks in Matric, 880 in FSc and my ECAT score is 230 out of 400. Can I get admission in UET Lahore?
state.advice: Congratulations on achieving a merit score of 74.84%! Given your profile and the merit formula used, with 25% weightage on matric marks, 45% on FSC marks, and 30% on ECAT marks, you have a strong foundation. Your ECAT score of 230 out of 400 contributes significantly to your overall score. Since you are eligible, focus on preparing for the next steps in the admission process. Keep in mind that UET Lahore is a competitive institution, but with a score like yours, you have a good chance. Ensure you meet all deadlines and requirements for UET Lahore. Best of luck!
